note: Headline numbers with their evidence. `npm run eval` re-derives this report and fails if any evidence file is missing — numbers cannot silently outlive their sources.

rows.metric: est. tokens of work exposed to 429 death
token spend on the same task set
tool calls to resume a half-done migration
pin_fact called before coding when user states a hard constraint
transcript-first recovery after a silent context cliff

honest_notes: v3 S-T probe is confounded: the handoff wording already instructs transcript use, so both conditions comply — the skill section is reinforcement, not the driver.

v2-large is an outcome NULL on strong models with clean trees: git status hands the naive agent the answer. The effect concentrates in weak models + messy working trees; v4 fixtures need planted distractor dirt.
All suites are simulated-budget or single-shot probes; live S1 (real tap + real account) ran informally throughout dogfooding, not as a controlled cell.
